formulas.name: EnquiryName
formulas.expression: IF({!Salutation} == null, IF({!FirstName}== null, {!LastName}, {!FirstName} + ' ' + {!LastName}) , IF({!FirstName} == null, {!Salutation} + ' ' + {!LastName}, {!Salutation} + ' ' + {!FirstName} + ' ' + {!LastName}))

fields.name: DispayText
fields.fieldText: Enter Contact Details:

validationRule.errorMessage: Please enter a 10-digit phone number using numbers only—without any spaces, letters, or special characters.
